subject: winged armored figure diving through cloudy skies, holding a curved staff glowing with energy
description: A humanoid figure in dark form-fitting armor plunges through a blue-grey cloudy sky with enormous white wings spread wide — one wing visible behind and one curling below. The figure holds a curved staff or hook glowing with a bright point of light at its tip. Ribbons of dark fabric or shadow trail behind. The composition is dynamic, conveying rapid downward flight. The background is entirely soft clouds and pale blue sky. No ground is visible.
foreground: winged armored humanoid figure holding a glowing curved staff, dark armor, large white wings
emotion: intense downward dive, purposeful and aggressive
